name: agent-fix
description: Audit and fix CSS ownership, unused CSS, unit test ownership and coverage, and assertion quality across repository packages.

interface.shortDescription: Fix CSS ownership, test coverage, and assertions
interface.longDescription: Audit and fix misplaced or unused CSS, unit test ownership, missing unit tests, and weak assertions across repository packages.
defaultPrompt: Use $fix-tests-styles to audit and fix CSS ownership, test coverage, and assertions in this repository.
